The Garden as Art
Enter the Garden Enter the Art Gallery

Welcome to The Garden as Art. This is a place where flowers, light, colour and seasons become part of a continuous artistic journey. Through paintings, photographs and reflections, the garden is presented not merely as nature, but as a living work of art.

Featured Work

"The Secret Garden"

Artist Nona Dronova
2022 · oil on canvas
Concept

A Living Dialogue Between Nature and Art

The garden is not only a space of nature, but also a space of creativity. The Garden as Art presents a decades-long artistic dialogue between nature and humanity, between painting and decorative-applied art, between observation and creation.

At the heart of the project lies an author's garden, created and cultivated as a living work of art. Its seasonal transformations, colour harmonies, light, plant textures and architectural accents become a source of inspiration for the artworks. The paintings of Professor Nona Dronova and the creative vision of Sergei Dronov reveal the garden as a distinctive artistic world — one where art does not depict nature, but continues it.

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
